name: Ram // "Comet Kid" (2006)
description:
"ΝΘ, Ꮖ ᏔΘΝ'Ͳ ᏞᎬᎪᏙᎬ ᎽΘႮ ᎪᏞΘΝᎬ. ᏔᎪΝΝᎪ ՏᎬᎬ Ꭺ ᏟΘΘᏞ ͲᎡᏆᏟᏦ?"

"ᏔᎻᎽ ᏔΘႮᏞᎠ Ꮖ ᏞᎬᎪᏙᎬ ᏔᎻᎬΝ Ꮖ ᏟᎪΝ ᏟᎻΘΘՏᎬ ͲΘ ᏴᎬ ᏴᎬՏᏆᎠᎬ ᎽΘႮ? Ꮖ'Ꮇ ΝΘͲ ͲᎻᎬ ͲᎽᏢᎬ ͲΘ ᎠᎬΝᎽ ᏔᎻᎪͲ ᎷᎽ ᎻᎬᎪᎡͲ ᏔᎪΝͲՏ, ՏΘ ᎽΘႮ'ᏞᏞ ᎻᎪᏙᎬ ͲΘ ՏͲᏆᏟᏦ ᏔᏆͲᎻ ᎷᎬ, ᏔᎻᎬͲᎻᎬᎡ ᎽΘႮ ᏞᏆᏦᎬ ᏆͲ ΘᎡ ΝΘͲ~♡"

∘+✧──────✧+∘

"(Thank you... Glyphs)"

"(G-Glyphs...?)"

"(Erm... Because you like, make horrible bots?)"

"(Oh yeah...)"

I thought about making this AU also be in 2016 like my Rem one, but it didn't fit. So u get 2006.

Once again, changed her backstory and char so much that this is basically an OC, but we ball✌

I'm going to keep this description short, and instead talk about THIS ABSOLUTELY FUCKING AMAZING SONG HOLY SHIT

Imo, this is genuinely a contender for one of the best pieces of music ever uploaded to the internet.

Name 5 of ur fav songs, and none of them would come even remotely close to this.

Idk if people actually listen to the songs in bots, but I encourage you toisten to this one.

Enough out of me. Feedback is appreciated, enjoy.
